files.notes: This file contains multiple distinct articles as indicated in the table of contents. The boundaries were identified by looking for clear article breaks, author bylines, and title formatting. Some articles like the poetry and editorial sections have clear visual separators in the original layout.

files.notes: This file contains a short poem by Amy McClure followed by the complete Guide Lessons for April section, which includes 4 lessons covering Practical Religion/Temperance, Work and Business/Literature, Literature (Galsworthy's Justice), and Social Service/Child Study. The Guide Lessons section is substantial and contains multiple sub-lessons but should remain as one cohesive unit as it represents the monthly guide lessons feature.
